ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the article was written */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the article was written */,
  "place" TEXT /* Location related to the article, stored as JSON */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the article */,
  "multimedia" TEXT /* JSON array of multimedia content associated with the article */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been viewed */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been shared on social media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, editor, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the article was updated */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor who made the changes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the article */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was from a mobile device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
